chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.110 of 2024 Mrs. Shabana Asif Balagamwala Versus Public at large Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as office objections not complied as yet. Dated: 23.05.2024 Mr. Kashan Ahmed Khan for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant, on instructions, does not press this appeal which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge Judge
